title: Bureau boundary and operational organs
goal: Make Bureau's Core/Ops/External Authority boundary explicit before larger refactors such as state-root hygiene, legacy removal, entry-point consolidation or ops extraction.
completion: README, architecture and ownership docs explicitly separate Bureau Core, Bureau Ops and external authorities.
State-root hygiene, legacy dependency audit, entry-point consolidation and ops extraction are represented as separate follow-up tasks.
No code-moving refactor is started before the authority model and audits are visible.
